This species is a type of bunchgrass that grows in high-altitude areas.

intro: Melica fisheri, also known as Fisher's melica, is a perennial grass species native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, and research has shown that it may have health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects.
